title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Phir Wohi Dil Laya Hoon
subTitle: Due to a rift in their relationship, Jamuna leaves her husband and takes her son Mohan with her. Years later, her husband announces that his son has returned, unaware that the man is an imposter.

title: Mausam
subTitle: A medical student nurtures a secret relationship with a woman during his college days. Several years later, he faces a rude shock after finding his illegitimate daughter involved in the flesh trade.

title: Classic Legends
subTitle: Host Javed Akhtar presents the lives and careers of the greatest personalities of the golden era of Bollywood, as a tribute to their work.

title: Shikar
subTitle: A man is killed when he tries to molest a girl. She absconds with the police on her trail and meets a man who tries to help her find the real murderer.

title: Satyakam
subTitle: Satyapriya Acharya, a guiltridden idealist, marries Ranjana, after failing to rescue her from being raped by his employer. However, conflict ensues as he is unable to accept her or her child completely.

title: Saugaat
subTitle: Saugaat

title: Hero
subTitle: Sooraj, the son of gangster Suryakant Pasha, kidnaps Radha, the daughter of the chief of police. They fall in love after spending some time together but the police and Pasha's men try to catch them.

title: Bombay to Goa
subTitle: Mala, a young woman, witnesses a murder and boards a Goa-bound bus to escape the killer. On the journey, she meets exciting people from different cultures and a young man who will not leave her side.

title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.

title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.

title: 36 Ghante
subTitle: Three jailed convicts break out of prison and hold a family hostage in their home. The terrorised family has to play along, for any attempt to contact the police could place them in the crossfire.

title: Classic Legends
subTitle: Host Javed Akhtar presents the lives and careers of the greatest personalities of the golden era of Bollywood, as a tribute to their work.

title: Banarasi Thug
subTitle: Shyam must accord with his mother's wishes to marry a girl of her choice. However, when he goes to meet the girl, he is trapped by a man who forces him to marry his daughter.

title: Sitara
subTitle: The life of a couple who shifts to Mumbai to prepare for their marriage, undergoes a drastic change when the lady becomes a popular movie star overnight and forgets her purpose amidst the glamour.

title: Dil Diwana
subTitle: Vijay, a playboy, is shocked when his ex-girlfriend, Gita, enters his life just when he is set to get married to his current girlfriend, Nita.

title: Kaamchor
subTitle: An idler falls in love with a rich girl and marries her, wanting to stay with her family. However, to his dismay, she decides to move out, prompting him to demand a share of his father-in-law's wealth.

title: Mere Humsafar
subTitle: A stowaway and a gypsy meet on their way to a big city. However, things take a turn when they lose sight of each other after arriving at their destination.

title: Mulzim
subTitle: A farmer wants to build a hospital in his village, but is at odds with a landlord who wants to build a theatre on the same land. To get him out of the way, the landlord frames the farmer for murder.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Narsingh Avatar
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Narsingh Avatar
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Himmat
subTitle: Raghu, a reformed criminal, rescues a woman and soon their love blossoms into a happy marriage. However, when the police arrive to catch him in connection with a murder, their lives turn upside down.

title: Hip Hip Hurray
subTitle: Sandeep, an engineer, takes up the temporary job of a sports teacher in a school. However, he gets confronted by the principal and is forced to prove his mettle despite all odds.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi
subTitle: When Sadhana marries Deepak, her manipulative mother urges her to harass her mother-in-law. Subsequently, she also meddles in her son's marriage, turning their lives into a web of misery.

title: Sangam
subTitle: Two best friends, Sundar and Gopal, love the same woman, Radha, while she has feelings only for Gopal. But when Sundar marries Radha, the love triangle is thrown into turmoil.

title: Saagar
subTitle: Raja secretly loves Mona, but she is in love with Ravi. However, Ravi's grandmother disapproves of their relationship and asks Mona to forget him and marry someone else.

title: Aakhree Raasta
subTitle: A man is falsely accused of his wife's murder and imprisoned. When he sets out to seek revenge, he finds a police officer on his trail who turns out to be his own son.

title: Qayamat
subTitle: Two close friends turn enemies when one becomes a criminal and the other, an IPS officer. Wronged by his friend, the criminal swears to take revenge once he returns from prison.
